zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Brookes於1504年出生在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓時，她的父親John  Thomas Brooke29歲，母親Jane Fitz Maurell22歲。她於1524年與Sir George Barne II在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年1月2日在英國倫敦享年55歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Brookes于1504年出生在英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓时，她的父亲John  Thomas Brooke29岁，母亲Jane Fitz Maurell22岁。她于1524年与Sir George Barne II在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年1月2日在英国倫敦享年55岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Brookes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Brooks
meanings: English: usually a variant of Brook , with excrescent -s. The optional addition of -s, with no grammatical function, is usually post-medieval, but some examples of the same person's name occurring with and without -(e)s have been noted as early as the 14th century in South Lancashire. The -es in such cases probably has neither a plural nor a genitival function, and the name means ‘dweller at the brook’, not ‘dweller at the brooks’. A plural sense cannot be ruled out elsewhere, but a non-grammatical -(e)s must also be considered a strong possibility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Brookes was born in 1504, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, her father, John  Thomas Brooke, was 29 and her mother, Jane Fitz Maurell, was 22. She married Sir George Barne II in 1524, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 2 January 1559, in London, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Brookes est née en 1504, à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John  Thomas Brooke, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jane Fitz Maurell, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Barne II en 1524, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1559, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1524 in London, England Sir George Barne II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1559 im Alter von 55 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

ko.Leighton, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Brookes(이)가 1504년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John  Thomas Brooke(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Fitz Maurell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 런던에서 Sir George Barne II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 1월 2일 영국 런던에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

ru.Leighton, Cheshire, England: лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Brookes родилась в 1504 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John  Thomas Brooke было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Fitz Maurell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Barne II в 1524 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 2 января 1559 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

Se casó con Sir George Barne II en 1524, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas.
